Valtron's Necklace of Wonder  
 

Lore Item No Trade
Slot: NECK
AC: 35
STR: +15 DEX: +15 AGI: +15 HP: +100
SV FIRE: +15 SV DISEASE: +15 SV COLD: +15 SV MAGIC: +15 SV POISON: +15
Focus: Spell Haste III
WT: 0.0 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Valtron's Necklace of Wonder
Lore Item No Trade
Slot: NECK
AC: 35
STR: +15 DEX: +15 AGI: +15 HP: +100
SV FIRE: +15 SV DISEASE: +15 SV COLD: +15 SV MAGIC: +15 SV POISON: +15
Focus: Spell Haste III
WT: 0.0 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Lore:Necklace of the Chosen
Item Type:Armor
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Seqtik
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-10 07:57:16
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

*This item is the result of a raid event.
Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 58
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Temple of Veeshan
NPC Name
Vulak`Aerr


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Temple of Veeshan


Uploaded July 9th, 2022 by halfridge
Send a correction
Post Comment
Amazed
QuoteReply
# Oct 25 2003 at 6:29 AM Rating: Decent
Aeldwan
View User Forum
Sage
109 posts
I just did a search of all Necklaces at this day and Age and sorted first by AC, then amazed sorted by HP's, then further amazed sorted by Saves. In all categories this necklace is the Number 2 BEST wearable necklace pre-PLane of TIME for most every melee class INCLUDING the Warrior. The number one being of course the Talisman of Vah Kerrath which is quite actually 5x's harder to get. Vulak is only time consuming to a good PoP guild that can drop Notables such as Bertox, Rydda Dar, and Mithaniel Marr. Going through everything to get VT keyed, mowing through 80% of the zone where you kill one mob and another spawns from it, and finally getting to kill Atenha Ra and he drops ONE quest bit... per week... *groan* (Thank GOD he drops amazing other things!) makes this a fantastic item and, relatively (vs Time and ToVK) easy to get. And this is over 2 year old now! I stand amazed...
____________________________
Master Aeldwan the Coercer and Decimator Buddercup Voxslayer of MT/Emarr
Glance the Stabber, Raiding Rogue of The Last Revolution
Kaarse the Ash Warden, Striker of the Black Desert
Keonka the Mangler of Drenden and Kager Ironveins Paladin of Arathor
Skuffal Skugbref of Chaos Wastes
Raene, Defiant of Harrow
Argus Grimm Elite Sniper of Auraxis and the 2RAF
"Doing the improbable daily to make the impossible seem easy"
▲ Page top
Question on lvl req
QuoteReply
# Aug 18 2002 at 4:11 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591781496659
1 post
If I lvled a character to lv 60 killed a lot of dragons and quest for really nice items such as this nice peice, Would I be able to delevel to like 45 and still have all the nice stats? If it wouldn't would there be any that I could use.
▲ Page top
RE: Question on lvl req
QuoteReply
# Oct 09 2003 at 9:08 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591794586507
11 posts
Canida, it sounds to me more like you have a level 45 toon and wonder what neck slot you should be wearing. Id tell you the best buyable and nodrop item and or items for you level and class but I only play an SK. Furthermore if you somehow got a level 45 into NToV and lived long enough to see this item drop (and that wont happen), yes it would have full stats as it has no level recomendations or reqiurements. WHy did I post this...I dont know im drinking rum tonight....
▲ Page top
RE: Question on lvl req
QuoteReply
# Oct 24 2002 at 5:59 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591750607099
121 posts
some equipment (ie nearly everything from CT) means you have to be level 51 minimum to use it.

VT loot requires level 60.

Maybe with PoP there will be items that require 65, who knows?

So i wouldnt say its a good idea to delevel to 45.

You would keep the good stats on some items, but as you delvel, you get less mana and HP per int and stamina point so you will still lose out.
▲ Page top

As a cleric that owns this item, all I can say is I am sooooo happy I didn't listen to ANYONE about who should use the item. As someone said, its a darn nice BP to wear on your neck. Now with its effect, I am all the more happier :)

The newest effect is "Spell Haste 3", which almost guarentees that it will be awarded to a Caster or Hybrid. (+15% haste on all spells cast! excluding CH, DA and spells under 3 secs)

▲ Page top
If i only had a dime for every time i read the words i will
QuoteReply
# Jan 15 2002 at 9:18 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592252373233
67 posts
if only i got a dime for every time i read someone stating that they will probably never see thies items, i have read at least one string per vullak item stating that. I guese we are all entitelled to gauk and drool at these things but you don't have to say it. It's like saying look ma i can drool at uber gear just like every one else, isnt that new.(the mother in return says no dear, you have been drooling for quite some time, the uber gear just made you drool more than normal.)

and now it is time for me to be the super hippicrit i am.

WOW! this gear is really awsome!! I bet i will never even get to see it!! derhuck.

well i am done spamming and i look forward to seeing the creative ways you all intend to flame on me.

singed,..... the anonymus dude on the other side of the zone that is shouting rude comments and is at the same time complain'n about not being able to find a group.

P.S. i would like to ask how much loot does vullak drop per kill, there are a ton of items credited to him, and i was wondering if that was due to him haveing huge drops or if tons of uber guilds have alreaddy taken him down.

Edited, Thu Jan 17 18:25:53 2002

OOOOOOOO 0.0wt YET AGAIN!!! MY GOD!!!

sorry for the sarcasm... but honestly, the whole wt thing is blown out of proportion. all these nonsense posts claiming items for monks... get a life. however, it is great for all melee classes, and excellent resist gear for anyone.

RE: Wow
QuoteReply
# Sep 06 2001 at 4:17 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592757687988
View User Forum
111 posts
alot of items this uber have 0 weight.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Sep 06 2001 at 7:47 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Definitely a melee item, look at the stats!
RE: Wow
QuoteReply
# Sep 06 2001 at 8:42 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591752385272
View User Forum
45 posts
I hate saying that schandsuch and item is Monk, or Warrior, or whatever. This makes me think that you are soloing this guy and that teamwork is not considered when you divide loot.

At the level needed to take this guy down, you are most definitely in a group. Consider the teamwork you needed to get here.

My guild has been having long talks about resist gear and getting the XP needed to take ToV. We're almost to UBER status. Being a druid, I'm most likely never even going to be considered for this roll. This all said, I would assume that if this dropped, it would go to someone on the pull teams we use. Not necessarily our monk, or our tanks, or our rougues, but the person who needs it the most. Hell, it may go to our chanter if they need it more than the tanks.

The point being that people need to stop arguing over *WHO* should get the item, and *HOW* you are going to get it in the first place. Decide later who will most benefit from the drops - it may not even be your first string of people.
▲ Page top
Woot
QuoteReply
# Sep 07 2001 at 2:48 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591763680369
9 posts
Woot, love for the chanter..
very nice necklace - when int and charisma is maxed out espeicially =)
▲ Page top
RE: Woot
QuoteReply
# Sep 08 2001 at 2:37 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592756910189
29 posts
This is a very good point, not everything with str and ac are for tanks, this would be great for everyone, and an enchanter the hps and ac would help me out when i'm pulling or running crowd control, and the str is nice when you need to carry extra gear, like when i smith, resists are very nice to boot. Would I roll for this, prob not, since most of the tanks i know can really use gear like this, ofcourse, once I get with a group of people that can take this mob, gear like the prob. helps everyone just as much. SO like someone else said, all/all means just that!

Valtron was the lead GM of the EMarr server for quite a while. I believe he moved on to bigger and better things at Verant/SOE. From everything I've heard he was a great guy. Several of my friends had direct interaction with him and thought he was great. He also passed out bottles of "Valtron's Finest" :)

# Sep 05 2001 at 5:38 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591750388498

I wonder if this necklace is the size of a breastplate since it has stats like one (a very good one at that).
I wonder how often Vulak'Aeeer is getting killed.
I wonder how long it'll be before Vu-vu gets an upgrade/nerf putting it even further out of my reach (ok I'm a mage so I'll never ever get this item but I meant killing Vu-vu further out of my reach.)
I wonder why I don't just go to bed so I can get up bright and fresh for another day of chemistry tomorrow.
▲ Page top
RE: Wonder indeed
QuoteReply
# Sep 06 2001 at 11:56 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592245528614
Scholar
36 posts
I don't think you have to worry too much about Vulak'Aerr getting nerfed. He's easily one of the most difficult opponents in the entire game at the moment, and requires the killing of every dragon in the north wing of ToV before you can even attempt him. All things considered, a nerf that makes him harder would be like them saying that the Avatar of War was too trivial and then nerfing the ability to charm giants in Kael... oh wait...

Crys
